seo.title: Toni Mateos - Professional Online Drum Recording
seo.description: Professional online drum recording service. Over 30 years of experience and 1000+ recorded albums.

samples.heading: Download our sample tracks
samples.subheading: Mix them in your studio and check the quality of our recordings
samples.imageAlt: Hyper-realistic Pro Tools session with colorful tracks

studio.title: The Studio
studio.subtitle: A space designed specifically to capture the best drum sound
studio.step1Text: Configure your setup according to your needs (from €49.90!)
studio.step2Text: Send everything we need to start your recording
studio.step3Text: We send the drum stems via WeTransfer in maximum quality

config.heroP1: Start with our basic setup that includes everything essential for a professional recording.
config.heroP2: 💡 Each element can be upgraded individually to create your perfect setup
config.imgAlt: Mic'd drum kit in professional studio

microphones.title: 🎤 Microphones
microphones.subtitle: Includes 8 professional microphones. Add premium upgrades for exceptional sound.

preamps.title: ⚡ Preamps
preamps.subtitle: The soul of your sound. Choose between our included preamps or upgrade to the legendary API, Neve and DAD.

interface.title: 🎛️ Audio Interface
interface.subtitle: The gateway between analog and digital. Converter quality defines your final sound.
interface.upgradeText: 🚀 Dramatic improvement in clarity and definition

production.title: Production
production.subtitle: Additional services to perfect your recording and adapt it to your specific needs.
production.additionalTimeDesc: For songs between 4 and 8 minutes long
production.samplePackDesc: We send you the sounds separately, at different volumes, from your session

video.title: Video
video.subtitle: Audiovisual services to complement your experience and promote your music.
video.socialGreetingDesc: 15-second greeting mentioning your project, to share on your social media
video.instagramShareDesc: 15-second video I'll share on my profile (30k followers) mentioning your project and inviting people to follow you

takes.title: Takes
takes.subtitle: Decide how many versions of your song you want. Each take brings a unique perspective.
takes.standardTakeDesc: Professional version based on your demo
takes.feat2: Based on your demo (similar, but not identical)
takes.feat3: Corrected and edited with Beat Detective
takes.proFeat4: Corrected and edited with Beat Detective
takes.recommended: 🎵 Recommended: Two perspectives of your song
takes.exactFeat1: An additional take, faithful to your demo
takes.exactFeat2: Every fill identical to the original
takes.exactFeat5: Corrected and edited with Beat Detective

delivery.title: 📦 Delivery
delivery.subtitle: Choose the delivery time that best suits your project.

extras.title: ✨ Extras
extras.subtitle: Add additional services to take your recording to the next level.
extras.multicamDesc: Multi-camera system with live audio and video, real-time production
extras.partituraDesc1: Real document: photograph of the original handwritten script used during the session.
extras.partituraDesc2: Fully handcrafted: authentic working annotations (not a perfect digital edition).
extras.partituraDesc3: Unique keepsake: an exclusive testimony of your song's creative process in the studio.

checkout.title: 🛒 Order Summary
checkout.subtitle: Review your configuration before completing your purchase
checkout.paypalDisclaimer: PayPal payment: includes a 5% additional processing fee
checkout.privacyConsent: I have read and accept the
checkout.mustAcceptPrivacy: You must accept the Privacy Policy to continue
checkout.stripeError: Error processing card payment. Please try again.
checkout.paypalError: Error processing PayPal payment. Please try again.

success.title: Payment Complete!
success.thankYou: Thank you for your purchase. Your drum recording order has been confirmed.
success.materialsTitle: 📋 To start the recording we need:
success.material2Note: (if you don't have it, we'll create it for you)
success.material3: The bit/sample rate of your project (sample rate and bit depth)
success.material4: The exact tempo in BPMs (or MIDI tempo map file if it contains tempo changes)
success.material5: Notes about the sound, style, etc. if you wish (you can add YouTube or Spotify links)
success.invoiceNote: 🧾 If you need an official invoice, please contact us at
success.questions: Have any questions? Contact us at

about.tagline: 30 years creating the perfect rhythm for your songs. From Barcelona to the world.
about.historyText: With 30 years of professional experience, I have had the privilege of working with some of the most recognized artists in Spanish music. My studio in Cardedeu, Barcelona, has become the place where the rhythms that accompany the emotions of millions of people are born.
about.skillsSubtitle: Every beat tells a story. These are the skills that allow me to bring your music to life.

micData.beta91Desc: Attack and definition without losing the low end
micData.u47fetDesc: The kick sounds better with a legend in front
micData.sen441Desc: The classic that captures every snare wire whisper
micData.m160Desc: The ribbon that tames the highs
micData.km184RideDesc: Ride with impeccable brightness and definition
micData.coles4038Desc: Vintage texture, depth and that UK touch
micData.c12Desc: The room sound of the great records
micData.u87Desc: The world legend of stereo room

checkoutForm.dragOrClick: Drag your file here or click to select
checkoutForm.noDrumsDemo: I don't have a drum demo
checkoutForm.tempoMap: Tempo Map (MIDI) - Only if tempo varies
checkoutForm.instructionsPlaceholder: YouTube/Spotify references, desired sound, specific style, etc.

billing.viesInvalidDesc: The local VAT rate for the corresponding country will be applied
